name: Harbin Gong Da High-Tech Enterprise Development Co.,Ltd.
summary: Harbin Gong Da High-Tech Enterprise Development Co., Ltd engages in the industrial manufacturing business primarily in Northeast and North China. It is involved in the processing of agricultural products and dairy products, as well as provides commerce and information services. The company's products include soybean deep processing and milk products. It also provides leasing, catering, and other services. The company is based in Harbin, China.
